items.title: Public Works Loans Act 1911
items.description: An Act to grant Money for the purpose of certain Local Loans out of the Local Loans Fund, and for other purposes relating to Local Loans.

items.title: Official Secrets Act 1911 (repealed)

items.title: Railway Companies (Accounts and Returns) Act 1911 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to amend the Law with respect to the Accounts and Returns of Railway Companies.

items.title: Copyright Act 1911
items.description: An Act to amend and consolidate the- Law relating to Copyright.

items.title: Small Landholders (Scotland) Act 1911
items.description: An Act to encourage the formation of Small Agricultural Holdings in Scotland, and to amend the Law relating to the Tenure of such Holdings (including Crofters' Holdings); to establish a Board of Agriculture for Scotland ; and for other purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Maritime Conventions Act 1911
items.description: An Act to amend the Law relating to Merchant Shipping with a view to enabling certain Conventions to be carried into effect.

items.title: Perjury Act 1911
items.description: An Act to consolidate and simplify the Law relating to Perjury and kindred offences.
